subcodes.title: Words spoken at Rue St. Didier 30 in Paris, 1913-02-20
subcodes.first_line: How dead to all spiritual emotions are the people of Paris! The inhabitants of this city are engrossed in the whirlpool of pleasure and self-gratification.
subcodes.subjects: @critique of Western values; culture, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
